goal: Link-building: ship a real embeddable tarot-draw widget + a 'How to Embed' page whose copy-paste snippet carries a DO-FOLLOW backlink to meowtarot.com (an iframe alone passes no SEO equity)
done: Rewrote /widget.html (+/th/) from the old broken dark-theme version into an on-brand, self-contained single-card draw (78 cards inline ~15KB, real CDN art at assets/moonmallow/<card_id>.webp, EN/TH via ?lang or /th/ path, CTA -> /cards/<slug>/ + powered-by -> home, all UTM-tagged). New /embed.html (+/th/): live preview iframe + copy-paste snippet whose attribution <a rel=noopener> (NOT nofollow) is the keyword-anchored backlink ('Free Tarot Reading — MeowTarot' / 'ดูดวงทาโรต์ฟรี — MeowTarot'). Added /embed + /th/embed to sitemap.xml
verified: Rendered widget (draw -> Two of Cups real face + keywords + /cards/two-of-cups/ link) and embed page (EN + TH) via local server in headless Chrome; snippet contains the do-follow attribution link, zero nofollow anywhere
